summary: Pre-existing: skipMigrations flag in makePgAdapter has no effect — migrations still fire
details: The bisect-skip-migrations.pg.test.ts gate test fails because makePgAdapter({ skipMigrations: true }) still applies migrations (20 tables created). The skipMigrations flag exists as a type parameter but is not wired in the adapter constructor. This is a separate concern from the applyMigrations idempotency fix and pre-exists the current change.
